items.title: Tokenized assets could become one of the biggest use cases for USDC
items.snippet: I've been thinking about Circle's long-term opportunity beyond just payments and crypto trading. The obvious story around USDC is stablecoin adoption: payments, remittances, treasury management, and settlement. But I think the more interesting question is what happens if more traditional financial assets start moving onchain. Tokenized equities are one example. Today, buying and trading stocks still relies on a lot of traditional infrastructure. Brokers, exchanges, clearing systems, settlement...
items.author: /u/MDiffenbakh

items.title: Been running an agent that pays for its own data over x402
items.snippet: Been experimenting with an agent that pays for things on its own, super basic small stuff, buying coinmarketcap data at a cent a call, just to start testing and see what actually breaks (I only funded it with 3 USDC in case things go south). Sharing my stack since people always ask, I’m using aeon(.)fun for the agent framework and for the wallet side, I’m using Finance District’s Agent Wallet, but I know there’s a couple of wallets for agents out there (Coinbase, Circle, think even Metamask rec...

items.title: Attacker Drains $24M in USDC From AFX Bridge on Arbitrum

items.title: Robinhood Chain Overtakes Base on Daily Active Users Three Weeks After Launch

items.title: Balance Coin Crashes 99% After Attacker Feeds a Fake Bitcoin Price Into 42DAO
items.snippet: An oracle-manipulation exploit let an attacker liquidate collateralized vaults that should have been safe, netting about $912,000 and collapsing the stablecoin's peg. The post Balance Coin Crashes 99% After Attacker Feeds a Fake Bitcoin Price Into 42DAO appeared first on Unchained .

coverage_notes: X/Twitter direct monitoring is not enabled because official API read access is paid. This dashboard avoids scraping or bypassing access controls.
Bluesky search uses the public endpoint when available. If it returns 403, add free-account BSKY_IDENTIFIER and BSKY_APP_PASSWORD repository secrets.
Reddit RSS and Mastodon public search may be rate-limited or incomplete depending on the platform.
YouTube search is optional and only runs when a free-quota YOUTUBE_API_KEY secret is configured.
